FACTS ABOUT TORONTO

Toronto is the provincial capital of Ontario with the population of 2,731,571 in 2016, making it the most populous city in Canada. Due to the large population of immigrants coming from different parts of the world, Toronto became one of the world’s most multicultural cities. Toronto is also a world leader in finance, business, entertainment, technology and culture areas. For that reason, commercial ACME pest control service is extremely popular in Toronto; although our residential pest control is exceptionally popular as well. Whether you live near North York, Etobicoke, Scarbrough, Yonge-Dundas Square or any other part of Toronto, you can order pest control near me at ACME. We will send qualified technicians to your house and provide an effective pest control. Our pest control service in Toronto includes cockroach control, bed bug exterminator, mice control, ant removal, wasps nest removal, bee nests removal, hornet nests removal, as well as termite control. With a set of innovative equipment, professional technicians and efficacious solutions, our pest control service will leave your house completely free of pests.Carpenter bees, carpenter ants, mice, raccoons, termites, and bed bugs are only some of the pests we can remove with our pest control in Toronto.

  • There are over 8,100 restaurants and bars in Toronto, taking 6.5% of the total businesses in the city.
  • Over 40 million people visit Toronto annually.
  • Toronto is proudly a home to over 10 million trees.
  • The list of top 20 most common insects found in Toronto includes ants, bed bugs, cockroaches, rodents, termites and wasps.

TORONTO PEST CONTROL SERVICES

RACCOON REMOVAL IN TORONTO

Acme Pest Solutions specializes in professional raccoon removal services across Toronto, providing humane and effective solutions for properties facing raccoon infestations. Raccoons frequently seek shelter in attics, garages, and crawl spaces, where they can cause damage and health concerns due to droppings and potential parasites. Our team at Acme Pest Solutions has the expertise to handle raccoon issues efficiently and safely, ensuring a secure environment for your home or business. Our service begins with a thorough inspection of the property to identify raccoon entry points and nesting areas. Based on this assessment, we develop a customized removal plan that prioritizes humane treatment, strictly adhering to local regulations. Once the raccoons are safely relocated, our team takes proactive steps to seal entry points and prevent future intrusions. We also provide expert guidance on how to reduce wildlife attractions on your property, helping you avoid repeat visits.

WILDLIFE REMOVAL IN TORONTO

AcmePestSolutions is Toronto’s trusted expert in humane wildlife removal services. Specializing in raccoon removal, squirrel removal, and comprehensive wildlife removal solutions, we’re dedicated to protecting homes and businesses from unwanted pests across Toronto. Our team combines advanced methods with a compassionate approach, ensuring safe and effective removal that keeps wildlife out—without harm. Whether you’re dealing with raccoons, squirrels, or other nuisance wildlife, AcmePestSolutions offers reliable, eco-friendly solutions to restore peace to your property. Choose Toronto's leading pest and wildlife removal experts today!

ANT CONTROL IN TORONTO

Ants occupy the first spot on list of the most common insects in Toronto. With over 100 species of ants in Canada, these pests have become a serious threat to properties across the country, including Toronto. Once ants establish a colony, it becomes very difficult to completely eliminate them from your house or office. When they find a food source, ants will keep coming back to the same place, no matter how many times you remove them. By following the trace of the first ants, every insect from the colony will know how to get inside your home and the infestation won’t stop until you completely remove all the ants from the colony in or around your house. For that reason, you need a professional ant removal service that will permanently eliminate ants from your property. The first step of ant removal is the identification of the species. In Toronto, carpenter ants, pavement ants, and pharaoh ants cause the most damage. ACME offers ultra-effective ant removal service that includes the elimination of all the listed species, in addition to a long list of other ant species that may infest your property.

RODENT CONTROL IN TORONTO

When mice and rats find a way to the inside of your property, it will become a mission impossible to get rid of them – until you order our rodent control service in Toronto. If you let rodents take over your house, you will not only clean the piles of dirt they leave behind; you will also run at risk of getting infected with some of the serious diseases that mice and rats spread, such as Hantavirus, Bubonic Plague, Rat-Bite Fever, and Salmonellosis. Home should be the safest place for you, do not let rodents change that! With ACME rat exterminator, and mice control we will carefully examine your entire property and perform an effective rodent removal in Toronto. All you need to do is call ACME and order our rodent control service in Toronto.

BED BUG REMOVAL IN TORONTO

Bed bugs are hidden predators that feed and live on your blood and don’t leave you alone even when you sleep! In fact, bed bugs are most active during the night. The warmth of your body and the carbon dioxide from your breath attract bed bugs so they can catch you anywhere – bed, sofa, couch, sides, you name it! Bed bugs can feed on your blood for 3 to 15 minutes. Before the feeding, bed bugs are usually light brown in color and have a flattened oval shape. After feeding, these bugs become rounder and darker, full of your blood! If you notice telltale signs of red or dark brown staining on your bed, you need to order ACME bed bug removal in Toronto urgently! There is no way bed bugs will just leave your house by themselves. You need a professional bed bug treatment to eliminate all the bed bugs from your house. ACME has a highly efficacious bed bug removal service. Our technicians will eliminate all the bed bugs from your property and ensure you, your family members and your pets are no longer harassed by bed bugs during the night.

ACME is the leading provider of pest control services in Toronto. You can order our pest control anytime and our team of experts will soon be at your property, eliminating all the pests that invade your space. Do not hesitate! Call ACME customer support right now and request our pest exterminator for a good price.
